forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 44. South wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 5pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 68. Southwest wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 32 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

weather_report:
The night in Boston whispers a gentle anticipation of the day ahead. Cloaked in low, thick clouds, the atmosphere feels weighed down by impending rain. A soft breeze meanders through the city, promising a hint of warmth amidst the cool embrace of the evening air, with temperatures resting gently around 44 degrees. As the city sleeps, the cloud cover obscures the stars, creating a canvas of muted grays that may tempt the occasional raindrop.

As dawn breaks, the day will unfold under mostly cloudy skies, punctuated by the chance of rain showers, particularly before the afternoon sun has a chance to assert itself. The high today hovers gracefully near 68 degrees, ushered in by a brisk southwesterly wind that playfully stirs, reaching gusts of up to 32 mph. Though the clouds may linger, there’s a notable lightness to the air, making it an ideal day for reflective strolls around the city. Layer up with a light, waterproof jacket to fend off any wayward sprinkles, paired with comfortable trousers—perfect for an unhurried walk through the public garden or along the banks of the Charles. 

As the day progresses, take advantage of the shifting light, perhaps finding solace in the cozy corners of a local café with a good book or indulging in a quiet moment at a park table, letting the sounds of the city weave their story around you.  Embrace the rhythm of this transitional season, where nature’s elements dance between sun and cloud, warmth and coolness, inviting a gentle exploration of the moments at hand.
